card.name: The Briny Deep
card.property: Contents: Namor (I) and Namor (II) (Namor (II) and Namor (III) instead for expert.) Namor, Atlantean Wilds, and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Experimental Weapons). Setup: Count from the bottom of the encounter deck and place the Deep reminder card above the fifteenth card (without looking). It has no in game effects, and is only to indicate when Namor is Deep. If the encounter deck is ever shuffled, re-place the Deep reminder card above the fifteenth card from the bottom again. Advance to 1B.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Namor the King of Atlantis is invading the surface!

card.name: Mystic Portals
card.property: Contents: Doctor Doom (I) and Doctor Doom (II). (Doctor Doom (II) and Doctor Doom (III) for expert mode.) Doctor Doom and Standard encounter sets. Doombot Factory, Vibranium Heist, Possession, Nuclear Threat, and 5 additional selected modular sets. (See Insert). Setup: Put the Leyline Network environment into play. Set the Demoralized environment and each of the 9 modular sets with their associated main schemes aside. Shuffle each remaining PORTAL environment together to create the PORTAL Deck and place it facedown next to the main scheme.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Doctor Doom is enacting a multi-faceted scheme to attack earth from multiple fronts and bring about global chaos through interconnected portals!

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase ends, place a portal counter here. If there are two or more portal counters here, complete this scheme.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Having gained access to a centralized mystic nexus of Leylines, Doctor Doom is trying to open as many simultaneous portals across the world as he can.

card.name: Leyline Network
card.property: Setup. When 4 or more [[PORTAL]] environments are in play, the players lose the game. Forced Response: After a main scheme is completed, reveal the top card of the [[PORTAL]] deck.

card.name: Protection Spell
card.property: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When Doctor Doom would take any amount of damage, remove that much threat from here instead. When the villain phase begins, complete the main scheme. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

card.name: Reflection Spell
card.property: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When a tough status card would be given to Doctor Doom while already has a tough status card, deal 1 damage to each friendly character in play instead. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

card.name: Spiked Armor
card.property: Attach to Doctor Doom. Doctor Doom gains retaliate 1. Hero Action: Spend [mental] [wild] resources -> discard this card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Your move." â€”Doctor Doom

card.name: Doom's Other Mask

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Your skin rarely feels the sun's warmth, does it, Victor?" â€”Soothsayer

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Give Doctor Doom a tough status card. If he is already tough, deal 1 damage to each friendly character instead.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Doom is the master of his passions, never mastered by them. And so, I am protected."â€”Doctor Doom

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Discard all tough status cards from friendly characters in play. If 1 or more tough status cards were discarded this way, give Doctor Doom a tough status card. If no tough status cards were discarded this way, Doctor Doom attacks you.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Your family is doomed, Reed."â€”Doctor Doom

card.property: "Doctor Doom is fighting ME. Which I have to admit is insanely cool... especially if I live to tell the tale." â€”Wiccan

card.name: Doombot
card.property: Guard. Toughness. Doombot ignores the piercing keyword. [star] Doombot's ATK is equal to the number of Doombot minions in play. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Reveal the set-aside Doombot Multiplication side scheme. Then, shuffle the rest of the Doombot Factory modular set into the encounter deck and advance to side B.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Doom has just opened a permanent portal to his home nation of Latveria. He'll have all the resources he needs to bolster his army of doombots now.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Interrupt: When a [[ROBOT]] minion enters play, place 1 [per_hero] threat here.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Just as we feared, Doom has upgraded all his Doombots and given them updated tactics on his nefarious plan. Don't let him open another portal!

card.name: Latveria

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Location. Portal.

card.property: Minions with the [[ROBOT]] trait get +1 SCH. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Latverian Industriousness A.
"This land is DOOM'S--AS IS THE WORLD ENTIRE!" -Doctor Doom

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Reveal the set-aside Vibranium Vault environment. Shuffle the Vibranium Heist modular set into the encounter deck and advance to side B.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Doom's opened a portal to Wakanda. There's only one thing there that's important enough for him to attempt this--Vibranium.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Completed: If the Vibranium Vault environment is still in play, remove it from the game and flip the Vibranium Stores environment.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Just received word that Doom is trying to break into Wakanda's primary vibranium vault. If he succeeds, God help us all.

card.name: Wakanda

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Location. Portal.

card.property: Minions with the [[ROBOT]] trait gain Incite 1. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Wakanda Infiltration A.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "When Wakanda is an ocean of blood, an answer to open this vault will surface." -Doctor Doom

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Reveal the set-aside Rescue Franklin! side scheme. Shuffle the Possession modular set into the encounter deck. Advance to side B.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Doom has opened a portal to Hell, and made an agreement with 3 powerful demons. There isn't much worse he could do than this!

property.name: Text
property.value: When Completed: If the Rescue Franklin! side scheme is still in play, remove it and the Franklin Richards ally from the game. Then, put the set-aside Demoralized environment into play.

property.name: Quote
property.value: We were wrong. Doom's orchestrated the kidnapping of Franklin Richards--Reed and Sue Richards' powerhouse of a son.

card.name: Hell

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Location. Portal.

card.property: Minions with the [[DEMON]] trait gain villainous. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Go to Hell A.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Choose your words carefully, demon. Victor Von Doom bows before no other." -Doctor Doom

property.name: Text
property.value: Setup. CONDITION. Increase the resource cost of THWART events by 1.

property.value: â€œHAHAHAHAHAHA!â€ â€”Doctor Doom

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: Shuffle the Nuclear Threat modular set into the encounter deck. Then, discard the top card of the encounter deck until a [[CITY]] environment or [[DISARM CODE]] attachment is discarded, then reveal it. Advance to side B.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Doom has opened a portal to a classified nuclear weapons bunker. No city is safe while he has access to these missiles.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Completed: If any [[CITY]] environments are in play, remove them from the game. Each player removes the top 2 cards of their deck and top 2 cards of their discard pile from the game for each [[CITY]] environment removed this way.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Doombots have painted several world capitals as targets. Disarm them asap!

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Location. Portal.

property.value: "...Holy geez." â€”Ben Grimm

property.name: Quote
property.value: Doctor Doom has just opened a portal directly to the streets of New York.

property.name: Text
property.value: The minion with the most remaining hit points engaged with each player gains villainous.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Word on the street is that Doom has been in talks with one of Spider-Man's rogues gallery and is taking a moment to recover while they distract you!

property.value: Doom is completely unpredictable! He has just opened a portal to a Hydra Base. At this point, it almost feels like he's just sowing chaos.

property.value: We received an energy signature from Doom consistent with other spells to open a portal, but we cannot detect a portal anywhere on earth...

property.value: Forced Interrupt: When a defending ally is defeated, place 1 [per_hero] threat here.
